Implements and defines the PPoGATT protocol for BLE communication, including session and characteristic management.


## Files
- **[ppogatt.c](ppogatt.c.md)**: Implements the PPoGATT protocol for managing Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) communication sessions, including client creation, packet handling, and session management.
- **[ppogatt.h](ppogatt.h.md)**: Header file for PPoGATT module, defining functions and structures for BLE characteristic handling.
- **[ppogatt_definition.h](ppogatt_definition.h.md)**: Defines UUIDs for PPoGATT service and characteristics in the Pebble Bluetooth framework.
- **[ppogatt_internal.h](ppogatt_internal.h.md)**: Defines data structures and constants for PPoGATT protocol communication in BLE client operations.
